function.name: _table_record_batch_delete
function.description: Batch delete specified data table records. Must delete the corresponding table data according to the prompt, and must not delete table data unrelated to the prompt. Args: tableId: Data table ID, must be filled, data comes from the id field obtained by calling _query_all_table_list, do not fabricate it yourself; recordIdList: Record ID list. Returns: Number of records deleted in batch
